payload.description: Public benefit corporation and a component unit of the State of New York whose mission is to continue, develop, and improve public transportation in the New York metropolitan area
External auditor for MTA, performs financial statement audits, single audits, pension audits, and agreed-upon procedures engagements
Provides subway and public bus service within the five boroughs of New York City
Operates certain bus routes in areas previously served by private bus operators

payload.description: Audit Committee meeting held at Ronan Board Room, 20th Floor, 2 Broadway. No quorum present.
Scheduled Audit Committee meeting at MTA Board Room, 20th Floor, 2 Broadway, 12:30-1:00 PM ET

payload.claim_text: Regarding the 2024 audit, Deloitte did not identify any material weaknesses or significant deficiencies. However, three control deficiencies were identified
The ERM program consists of the following four components: (i) Enterprise Risk Assessment, (ii) Control Self-Assessment, (iii) Issues Management and (iv) Policy Life Cycle Management
Key risk areas: Cyber Security, Equipment Maintenance, Reputational Risk, Safety, Security and Succession Planning

tool_args.label: All pension plans received clean opinions

payload.claim_text: All plans have an unmodified ("clean") opinion
